description_long: This is a striking orange Lamborghini sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and sharp, angular lines. The front features aggressive headlights and a sculpted hood, while the sides display prominent air intakes and sleek, contoured doors. The rear showcases a transparent engine cover, revealing the powerful engine beneath, and dual exhausts integrated into a bold rear bumper. Black alloy wheels with a five-spoke design add to its sporty appearance, and the roofline is low and streamlined for optimal performance. The windows are tinted, and the overall build emphasizes speed, luxury, and exclusivity. The interior, though only partially visible, appears to be finished with high-quality materials and advanced controls.
description: A vivid orange Lamborghini sports car with sharp lines, black five-spoke wheels, and a transparent engine cover, exuding luxury and high performance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aggressive headlights, sculpted hood, and low, wide stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sleek profile, prominent air intake, and black alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the transparent engine cover, dual exhausts, and angular rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the aerodynamic shape and door contours.
